where.venue: Throughout the city, Plaza Ayuntamiento for mascleta

what.description: World-famous festival celebrating Saint Joseph with massive sculptural monuments (fallas), fireworks, music, and celebrations. Daily mascleta (gunpowder/firework display) at 14:00 in Plaza Ayuntamiento. The festival culminates in La Crema on March 19, when all the fallas sculptures are burned. Approximately 90 minutes drive from Altea.
what.price_notes: Free to attend, food and souvenirs extra

practical.parking: Very difficult, use public transport from Costa Blanca
practical.transport: TRAM from Altea to Valencia, or drive (90 mins)

meta.notes: Festival runs March 1-19, 2026. Key events on weekends are best for visitors.
